member.name: T:TradeApi.CustomColumns.CustomColumn
member.summary: The base class for the custom columns.

member.name: P:TradeApi.CustomColumns.CustomColumn.CurrentPanelType
member.summary: Gets on which custom column was added.

member.name: M:TradeApi.CustomColumns.CustomColumn.Init
member.summary: Constructor. This method will be called before the column will be run

member.name: M:TradeApi.CustomColumns.CustomColumn.Complete
member.summary: This function will be called before removing.

member.name: M:TradeApi.CustomColumns.CustomColumn.GetSortValue(TradeApi.CustomColumns.Row)
member.summary: Gets value from the specified column.
member.param: Defines index of the required column.
member.returns: Returns the value of the referenced column, or null if it doesn't exist in the selected range.

member.name: M:TradeApi.CustomColumns.CustomColumn.GetDisplayValue(System.Object,TradeApi.CustomColumns.Row)
member.summary: Returns specified value of row with custom format.

member.name: M:TradeApi.CustomColumns.CustomColumn.Update(TradeApi.CustomColumns.Row,TradeApi.CustomColumns.CustomColumnEventArgs)
member.summary: You can implement your action here

member.name: T:TradeApi.CustomColumns.CustomColumnEventArgs
member.summary: Represents the base class for classes that contain event data, and provides a value to use for events that do not include event data.

member.name: P:TradeApi.CustomColumns.Row.Count
member.summary: Get numbers of columns in panel.

member.name: P:TradeApi.CustomColumns.Row.Account
member.summary: Gets Account object for the row (if exist, otherways null)

member.name: P:TradeApi.CustomColumns.Row.Instrument
member.summary: Gets Instrument object for the row (if exist, otherways null)

member.name: M:TradeApi.CustomColumns.Row.GetSortValue(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets value from the specified column.
member.param: Defines index of the required column.
member.returns: Returns the value of the referenced column, or null if it doesn't exist in the selected range.

member.name: M:TradeApi.CustomColumns.Row.GetSortValue(System.String)
member.summary: Gets value from the specified column.
member.param: Defines name of the required column.
member.returns: Returns the value of the specified column, or null if it doesn't exist.

member.name: M:TradeApi.CustomColumns.Row.GetDisplayValue(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets formatted value from the specified column.
member.param: Defines index of the required column.
member.returns: Returns the formatted value of the referenced column, or null if it doesn't exist in the selected range.

member.name: M:TradeApi.CustomColumns.Row.GetDisplayValue(System.String)
member.summary: Gets formatted value from the specified column.
member.param: Defines name of the required column.
member.returns: Returns the formatted value of the specified column, or null if it doesn't exist.

member.name: M:TradeApi.History.HistoricalDataManager.Get(TradeApi.History.HistoricalRequest,TradeApi.History.Interval)
member.summary: Adds access to historical data based on requested type
member.param: historical request of the future fetched historical data
interval with depth of the historical data

member.name: M:TradeApi.History.HistoricalDataManager.ChangeInterval(TradeApi.History.HistoricalData,TradeApi.History.Interval)
member.summary: Updates historian interval of the series
member.param: new interval with depth of the historical data

member.name: M:TradeApi.History.HistoricalDataManager.Remove(TradeApi.History.HistoricalData)
member.param: fetched historical data to be removed

member.name: M:TradeApi.History.HistoricalDataManager.AddCustom(System.String,TradeApi.History.CustomData)
member.summary: Adds custom data with synchronized internal requested data
member.param: the name of the custom historical data

member.name: M:TradeApi.History.HistoricalDataManager.GetCustom(System.String)
member.summary: Gets access to custom data with synchronized internal requested data
member.param: the name of the custom historical data

member.name: M:TradeApi.History.HistoricalDataManager.RemoveCustom(System.String)
member.summary: Removes custom historical data from the cache
member.param: the name of the custom historical data

member.name: F:TradeApi.History.HistoricalDataManager.OnLoaded
member.summary: Occurs when the historical data was loaded

member.name: F:TradeApi.History.HistoricalDataManager.OnRemoved
member.summary: Occurs when the historical data was removed

member.name: M:TradeApi.History.BarData.GetOpen(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets an open price of the bar by offset

member.name: M:TradeApi.History.BarData.GetHigh(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets high price of the bar by offset

member.name: M:TradeApi.History.BarData.GetLow(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets low price of the bar by offset

member.name: M:TradeApi.History.BarData.GetClose(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets low price of the bar by offset

member.name: M:TradeApi.History.BarData.GetTimeUtc(System.Int32)
member.summary: Amount of ticks per given historical bar

member.name: M:TradeApi.History.BarData.GetVolume(System.Int32)
member.summary: Volume of Ticks for Bid/Ask based Historical data, or volume of Trades for Trade based Historical data

member.name: M:TradeApi.History.BarData.GetTicks(System.Int32)
member.summary: Amount of ticks per given historical bar

member.summary: The ask price of the required Historical tick

member.summary: The bid size of the required Historical tick

member.name: M:TradeApi.History.BBOData.GetVolume(System.Int32)
member.summary: The volume of the required Historical tick

member.name: M:TradeApi.History.BBOData.GetTimeUtc(System.Int32)
member.summary: The volume of the required Historical tick

member.summary: Returns the time of custom elements being added in UTC

member.summary: Returns the value from custom data series
member.param: the price type of the custom data

member.summary: Sets the value to custom data series

The element offset in the custom data series
value to be set to custom data series

member.summary: Returns value from custom historian series by index
member.param: a series where value is stored
The element offset in the custom series

member.summary: The count of the custom data elements

member.summary: A collection of the unit indexes which are the lowest values within interval

member.summary: A collection of the unit indexes which are the lowest values within interval

member.summary: The count of the historical data elements

the DateTime interval to be filled in collection

member.summary: Time in UTC of historical trade

member.summary: Represent the amount of historical elements

member.summary: The amount of price movement required to shift a chart to the right. This condition is used on charts that only take into consideration price movement instead of both price and time

member.summary: Units (bars or ticks) count, which is visible within the chart window

member.summary: Specifies the default source on which chart is build (ByBidAsk, ByBid, ByAsk, ByTrades etc.)

member.name: P:TradeApi.Indicators.Chart.BarsWidth
member.summary: Bar width value, which is on the chart window

member.summary: Provides the index of window with specified indicator, otherwise it returns -1

member.param: indicator name to search its location window

member.name: M:TradeApi.Indicators.Chart.GetChartPoint(TradeApi.Indicators.TimeValue,System.Int32)
member.summary: Provides a chart coordinate point based on price (y-axes), time (x-axes) and any window specified by number (optional param, 0 is a default)
member.param: the cross of the time in UTC and unit value

member.name: M:TradeApi.Indicators.Chart.GetTimeValue(System.Drawing.PointF,System.Int32)
member.summary: Provides a TimeValue structure based on the given chart point on any window specified by index (optional param, 0 is a default)

member.summary: Computes the location of the specified screen point into chart coordinates resulting main GUI thread invoke

member.name: M:TradeApi.Indicators.Chart.ChartPointToScreen(System.Drawing.Point)
member.summary: Computes the location of the specified chart point into screen coordinates resulting a parent gui thread invoke

member.name: M:TradeApi.Instruments.InstrumentsManager.Subscribe(TradeApi.Instruments.Instrument,TradeApi.Quotes.QuoteTypes)
member.summary: The Subscribe method is used to create a subscription to a resource.This method is used to specify the details about the event to be monitored: what instrument use to monitored; what the type of quotes uses will be subscribed.
member.param: quote type to be subsrcribed to

member.name: M:TradeApi.Instruments.InstrumentsManager.UnSubscribe(TradeApi.Instruments.Instrument,TradeApi.Quotes.QuoteTypes)
member.summary: The Unsubscribe operation is used to end a pull subscription. The Unsubscribe element contains the parameters used to unsubscribe from a subscription.
member.param: quote type to be subsrcribed to

member.name: E:TradeApi.Instruments.InstrumentsManager.OnInstrumentAdded
member.summary: Occurs when the new instrument is coming

member.name: E:TradeApi.Instruments.InstrumentsManager.OnLevel2
member.summary: Occurs when the new level2 quote by the subscribed instrument is coming

member.name: E:TradeApi.Instruments.InstrumentsManager.OnTrades
member.summary: Occurs when the new trade quote by the subscribed instrument is coming

member.name: E:TradeApi.Instruments.InstrumentsManager.OnBBO
member.summary: Occurs when the new best bid offer quote by the subscribed instrument is coming

member.summary: Show depth of market by ask price

member.name: M:TradeApi.Instruments.MarketDepth.DepthBid(TradeApi.Instruments.DepthAggregate)

member.name: P:TradeApi.Instruments.TicksizeTickcost.TickCost
member.summary: The cost of the smallest price change in the quoted currency, per one lot Zero means TickCost is not specified and can be calcaulted as LotSize / TickSize

member.name: T:TradeApi.ToolBelt.BaseScript
member.summary: Base class dedicated to scripts to be developed for the platform

member.name: M:TradeApi.ToolBelt.BaseScript.Init
member.summary: This function is called once before script’s work starts

member.name: M:TradeApi.ToolBelt.BaseScript.Update(Runtime.Script.TickStatus)
member.summary: This function is called amid new quote, new bar or history processing. It contains argument with a tick status to monitor quote state (args.TickStatus,IsHistory/IsBar/IsQuote)
member.param: TickStatus enum value either IsBar or IsQuote after history processing with initial IsHistory

member.name: M:TradeApi.ToolBelt.BaseScript.Complete
member.summary: This function is called before removing script

member.name: P:TradeApi.ToolBelt.BaseScript.HistoryDataSeries
member.summary: Represent access to instrument’s historical data based on current chart

member.name: P:TradeApi.ToolBelt.BaseScript.IndicatorsManager
member.summary: An indicator manager reference to obtain usage of buildin and custom indicators

member.name: P:TradeApi.ToolBelt.BaseScript.InstrumentsManager
member.summary: A manager reference to query and manage vendor's instruments

member.name: P:TradeApi.ToolBelt.BaseScript.AccountManager
member.summary: A manager reference to retrieve accounts

member.name: P:TradeApi.ToolBelt.BaseScript.HistoricalDataManager
member.summary: A historicaldata manager reference to wield custom control over extra required historical element

member.name: E:TradeApi.ToolBelt.Connection.OnConnectionChange
member.summary: Occurs when the connection state is changed (ConnectionState.Connected/Disconnected)

member.summary: The variable will be removed on exit

member.summary: The variable will be written to file

member.summary: Concats name and value of the global variable

member.summary: Returns variables' count in global storage

member.summary: Check if variable with specified name exists in global storage

member.name: M:TradeApi.ToolBelt.GlobalVariableManager.GetGlobalVariableList
member.summary: Returns all global variables as list

member.name: M:TradeApi.ToolBelt.GlobalVariableManager.Remove(System.String)
member.summary: Removes specified variable from global storage

member.name: M:TradeApi.ToolBelt.GlobalVariableManager.RemoveAll
member.summary: Removes all variables from global storage

member.summary: Removes all variables from global storage

member.summary: Performs a variable assigning from a global storage if such name exists in a scope

member.name: M:TradeApi.ToolBelt.GlobalVariableManager.Flush
member.summary: Saves all serializable variables to disk

member.summary: Shows all given args in message screen

member.summary: Prints out the args in logs

member.summary: Gets the count of accepted orders

member.summary: Account's unique details available from server/vendor

member.summary: Returns last modification time for the order in UTC

member.summary: Returns notation for the selected order

member.summary: The date of expiration order in UTC for GTD orders

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.AverageFilledPrice
member.summary: An average price of the order fill

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.Instrument
member.summary: Represents the information of instrument for order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.IsActive
member.summary: Checks if order is pending on server

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.IsAutoTrade
member.summary: Checks if order is invoked by strategy

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.IsStopLossOrder
member.summary: Returns true if specified order is a slave Stop Loss order in context of primary order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.IsTakeProfitOrder
member.summary: Returns true if specified order is a slave Take Profit order in context of primary order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.BoundTo
member.summary: The if of bound order. It is related to OCO

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.BoundToId
member.summary: If it is a bound order.

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.SLTPPriceType
member.summary: Manages take profit/stop loss and trailing stop loss offset type as one of options: absolute/tick or point

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.Price
member.summary: Price at which order can be executed

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.StopPrice
member.summary: Stop Price of the Limit order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.Side
member.summary: Side of the order (Buy or Sell)

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.StopLossPrice
member.summary: Returns a stop-loss price or null if none is in context of primary order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.StopLossLimitPrice
member.summary: Returns a stop-loss limit price or null if none is in context of primary order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.TakeProfitPrice
member.summary: Returns a take-profit price based on SLTPPriceType or null if none is in context of primary order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.TralingStopPrice
member.summary: Returns a trailing stop price or null if none is in context of primary order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.TrailingStopOffset
member.summary: Returns a trailing offset value or null if none is in context of primary order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Order.PlacedTimeUtc
member.summary: Date and time when the order was placed in UTC

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.OrderRequest.Account
member.summary: Account that invoked an order (SINGLE + MULTIASSET)

member.summary: Custom name of an order given by user

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.OrderRequest.Comment
member.summary: Returns notation for the selected order

member.summary: Stop Price for the StopLimit order

member.summary: Side of the order BUY or SELL

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.OrderRequest.StopLossPrice

member.summary: Set price level of the stop loss limit order accompanied by primary order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.OrderRequest.TakeProfitPrice
member.summary: Set price level of take profit order accompanied by primary order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.OrderRequest.SLTPPriceType
member.summary: Manages take profit/stop loss and trailing stop loss offset type as one of options: absolute or tick

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.OrderRequest.TrailingStopOffset
member.summary: Set offset points to trigger Trailing Stop order accompanied by primary order

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.OrderRequest.#ctor(TradeApi.Trading.OrderType,TradeApi.Instruments.Instrument,TradeApi.Trading.Account,TradeApi.Trading.OrderSide,System.Double,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: A shortcut to create basic order request with optional parameters.
member.param: the instrument on which order is based
the account on which order is based

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.OrdersManager.Count
member.summary: Returns number of all open orders excluding SL and TP

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.OrdersManager.TotalSellQuantity
member.summary: Gets sell quantity of all pending orders

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.OrdersManager.TotalBuyQuantity
member.summary: Gets buy quantity of all pending orders

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.OrdersManager.SLTPCount
member.summary: Returns number of all open Stop Loss and Take Profit orders

member.summary: Returns number of all open orders excluding SL and TP
member.param: include sl and tp in count

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.OrdersManager.GetOrders(System.Boolean,System.Predicate{TradeApi.Trading.Order})
member.summary: Gets a collection of all only opened orders. With optional delegate to grasp sl and tp orders, one side only and type filter. Access to the orders can be obtained by index.
member.param: include sl and tp in count
A delegate that contains a set of criteria and checks whether the passed parameter meets those criteria or not

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.OrdersManager.Cancel(System.Collections.Generic.List{TradeApi.Trading.Order})
member.summary: Cancels orders with target and optional account parameter, resulting true if all are canceled successfully
member.param: include sl and tp in count

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.OrdersManager.GetOrder
member.summary: TODO: если и нужно то наверно сделать с параметром predicate. пока скрыл приватом

member.summary: Sends trading order asynchronously with optional callback function
member.param: Method to be triggered as callback

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.OrdersManager.CancelAsync(TradeApi.Trading.Order,System.Action{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Cancels orders asynchronously with target and optional account parameter, resulting true if all are canceled successfully
member.param: Method to be triggered as callback

member.summary: Replaces an order asynchronously by modifying ReplaceOrderRequest with optional callback function
member.param: Request to be implemented to update an order
Method to be triggered as callback

member.summary: The event at which the new order was placed

member.summary: Occurs when the order was filled (FillSize args is partial or full)

member.name: E:TradeApi.Trading.OrdersManager.OnCancel
member.summary: The event at which the new order was canceled

member.name: E:TradeApi.Trading.OrdersManager.OnUpdate
member.summary: The event at which the new order was updated

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.ReplaceOrderRequest.#ctor(TradeApi.Trading.Order,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Creates request for changing price and amount.

member.summary: Value of the order in lots.

member.summary: Stop Price for the StopLimit order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.ReplaceOrderRequest.SLTPPriceType
member.summary: Manages take profit/stop loss and trailing stop loss offset type as one of options: absolute or tick

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.ReplaceOrderRequest.StopLossPrice
member.summary: Set price level of the stop loss order accompanied by primary order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.ReplaceOrderRequest.StopLossLimitPrice
member.summary: Set price level of the stop loss limit order accompanied by primary order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.ReplaceOrderRequest.TrailingStopOffset
member.summary: Offset points to trigger the trailing stop loss.

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.ReplaceOrderRequest.TakeProfitPrice
member.summary: Set price level of take profit order accompanied by primary order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.ReplaceOrderRequest.ExpirationTime
member.summary: The date of expiration order (for GTD orders).

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.ReplaceOrderRequest.BoundTo
member.summary: The order which current order is bound to; if the former is executed, the system cancels the latter. Used by OCO orders.

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.TradeResult.Message
member.summary: Returns an error message if order is not valid

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.TradeResult.HasError
member.summary: Determines either order has been placed right or wrong with signaling an error existence

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.TradeResult.Id
member.summary: Returns an id number if order has been placed

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Position.Account
member.summary: Provides account with which the position was opened

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Position.Name
member.summary: Custom name of an position given by user

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Position.SLTPOrders
member.summary: Collection of closing order which is bound to primary order

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Position.OpenOrderID
member.summary: Open order Id of the position

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Position.Instrument
member.summary: Represents the information of instrument for position

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Position.OpenPrice
member.summary: Price at which the position was opened

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Position.OpenTimeUtc
member.summary: Price at which the position was opened

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Position.Side
member.summary: Operation with which the position was opened(Long or Short)

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Position.NetPnL
member.summary: Profit/loss position ratio based on the current broker's price. For open position it shows the profit/loss you would make if you close the position at the current price. If position closed, this parameter show profit/loss what trader have after closing this position. During backtesting this value is equal to GrossPnL amid absence of fee etc.

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.Position.GrossPnL
member.summary: Profit/loss position ratio (without swaps or commissions) based on the current broker's price. For open position it shows the profit/loss you would make if you close the position at the current price. If position closed, this parameter show profit/loss what trader have after closing this position.

member.name: P:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.Count
member.summary: Returns number of all open positions

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.GetPositions
member.summary: Returns a collection of all open positions. Access to the positions can be obtained by index.

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.GetPositions(System.Predicate{TradeApi.Trading.Position})
member.summary: Returns a collection of all open positions by given criteria. Access to the positions can be obtained by index.
member.param: A delegate that contains a set of criteria and checks whether the passed parameter meets those criteria or not

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.CloseAll(TradeApi.Trading.Account)
member.summary: Close all positions with optional account parameter. Returns an indication whether the positions are closed successfully
member.param: An optional account parameter to specify the scope of position closing

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.CloseAsync(TradeApi.Trading.Position,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Action{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Closes single position asynchronously with optional quantity and callback as result of asynchronous work
member.param: the lot size of the close order
will be used after successful closing an operation

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.Close(TradeApi.Trading.Position,System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Close single position with optional quantity.
member.param: the lot size of the close order

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.RemoveStopLossAsync(TradeApi.Trading.Position,System.Action{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Removes stop-loss order from given position asynchronously
member.param: will be used after successful closing an operation

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.RemoveStopLoss(TradeApi.Trading.Position)
member.summary: Removes stop-loss order from given position synchronously

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.RemoveTakeProfitAsync(TradeApi.Trading.Position,System.Action{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Removes take profit order from given position asynchronously
member.param: will be used after successful operation

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.RemoveTakeProfit(TradeApi.Trading.Position)
member.summary: Removes take profit order from given position synchronously

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.SetStopLossAsync(TradeApi.Trading.Position,System.Double,System.Action{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Sets a new (modifies existed) stop-loss order with given position asynchronously
member.param: a position to be set with pending stop loss
a price of the stop loss
will be used after successful operation

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.SetStopLossAsync(TradeApi.Trading.Position,System.Double,System.Double,System.Action{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Sets a new (modifies existed) stop-loss order with given position asynchronously
member.param: a position to be set with pending stop loss
a limit price of the stop loss
a stop price of the stop loss
will be used after successful operation

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.SetStopLoss(TradeApi.Trading.Position,System.Double)
member.summary: Sets a new (modifies existed) stop-loss order with given position synchronously
member.param: a position to be set with pending stop loss
a price of the stop loss

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.SetStopLoss(TradeApi.Trading.Position,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Sets a new (modifies existed) stop-loss order with given position synchronously
member.param: a position to be set with pending stop loss
a limit price of the stop loss
a stop price of the stop loss

member.summary: Sets a new (modifies existed) take-profit order with given position synchronously
member.param: a position to be set with pending take profit
a price of the take profit
will be used after successful operation

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.SetTakeProfit(TradeApi.Trading.Position,System.Double)
member.summary: Sets a new (modifies existed) take-profit order with given position synchronously
member.param: a position to be set with pending take profit
a price of the take profit

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.SetTrailingStopAsync(TradeApi.Trading.Position,System.Double,System.Int32,System.Action{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Sets a new (modifies existed) trailing-top order with given position synchronously
member.param: a position to be set with trailing stop
a price of the trailing stop to start
an offset to be trailed with active position
will be used after successful operation

member.name: M:TradeApi.Trading.PositionsManager.SetTrailingStop(TradeApi.Trading.Position,System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets a new (modifies existed) trailing-top order with given position synchronously
member.param: a position to be set with trailing stop
a price of the trailing stop to start
an offset to be trailed with active position
